title: LinkedIn Post Generator - Posts
description: LinkedIn posts generated by the LinkedIn Post Generator plugin. Tracks topics, frameworks used, audience targeting, and generated content. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Post Topic.description: The topic or theme of the LinkedIn post.

Post Content.description: The full generated LinkedIn post text, ready for copy/paste.

Framework.description: The post framework used to structure the content.

Audience.description: Target audience segment for the post.

Hashtags.description: Generated hashtags for the post, space-separated.

Style Notes.description: Notes on tone, voice, or style preferences applied.

Output File.description: Local file path where the post was saved, if applicable.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the post was generated.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Post Topic serves as the primary identifier. Re-running on the same topic and framework updates the existing record (idempotent by Post Topic + Framework + same calendar day).
